# nide8auth Runtime Agent

This directory contains the Unified Pass/Nide8 Java agent used at runtime by Suika Launcher.

- File: `nide8auth.jar`
- Implementation title: `nide8auth`
- Implementation vendor: `nide8`
- Implementation version: `2.8`
- Implementation timestamp: `2026-04-04T13:04:18+0800`
- SHA1: `ceac742d5a7b6eed02765eb8b0786729eea19c7c`

The default Suika Unified Pass server metadata reports the same SHA1 in `jarHash`.

The jar is distributed as an independent third-party runtime component for Unified Pass authentication. It is installed next to the launcher executable by CMake packaging rules and loaded only for Unified Pass accounts.
